The '''X1 carbine''' was a [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptor]] [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] weapon produced by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. A variant of this weapon called the '''Malevolent bowcaster''' also existed. Non-Wookiee spacers were known to obtain modified versions of the weapon from the [[Avatar Orbital Platform]]. This weapon was used during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] to defend the [[Tree/Legends|tree]]-[[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]].

The X1 was a weapon mass-produced in workshops across [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The ornamental weapon featured an elongated [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]], and a ring-grip was particular to southern hemisphere tree-cities. [[Merumeru/Legends|Merumeru's]] Wookiee warriors were armed with disruptor rifles during the Battle of Kashyyyk at the climax of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
